ground_truth.title: 8 ​​Top Online Graphic Design Schools to Consider in 2025
ground_truth.author: Rosie Allabarton
ground_truth.main_content:
Are you considering learning graphic design? Check out these top schools and courses for 2025! With the demand for graphic designers continuing to grow across a range of sectors, finding the right graphic design school to launch a new career in the field or enhance an existing one is crucial. Whether you're just starting out on your graphic design journey, or you're an industry professional looking to refresh your skills, online graphic design programs can help you reach your learning goals. But how do you know which is the right school for you? From bootcamps and certificate courses to full-time degree programs, the market is flooded with online learning opportunities to help you develop your graphic design skills.

What is graphic design? Graphic design is a creative discipline that involves combining art, technology, and design to create visual content to convey specific messages to targeted groups. The process involves the implementation of several different elements including color, visual hierarchy, page layout, typography, and imagery which are used to create harmonious visual compositions.

8 top online graphic design schools:

1. California Institute of the Arts (CalArts) - Online Graphic Design Specialization: Originally founded in 1961, CalArts is a private art school located in Santa Clarita, California. The school's Online Graphic Design Specialization, available through Coursera, is a comprehensive program designed to support students in learning essential skills for graphic design careers. The course is divided into five separate learning modules covering typography, color theory, image-making, and fundamental design principles. Price: 7-day free trial, then €44 a month. Duration: 2 months at 10 hours per week.

2. Parsons School of Design - Online Graphic Design Certificate: Founded in 1896, Parsons is one of the oldest educational establishments for art and design in New York City. Parsons Online Graphic Design Certificate has been created for those seeking to build a solid foundation in graphic design without committing to a full degree program. The program teaches essential design principles, color theory, typography, and skills in digital media including Adobe Creative Cloud. Price: $7,800. Duration: 18 months on average.

3. AND Academy - Graphic Design Certificate: AND Academy is a design upskilling platform launched by the Indian Institution of Art and Design (IIAD), in collaboration with Kingston School of Art in London. The Graphic Design Certificate is a fast-track course for working professionals looking to learn key concepts and fundamental principles for print and digital media designs. The course runs for 18 weeks including 100 hours of live sessions with industry experts. Duration: 18 weeks, 100 hours of live lessons. Learning format: Fully online with instructor-led sessions.

4. Udemy: Introduction to Graphic Design: Udemy is an education technology platform founded in 2010 and based in San Francisco. The Introduction to Graphic Design Course covers core concepts such as color theory, typography, layout, and composition, supporting students as they build a strong foundation in visual communication. Price: €19.99. Duration: 11.5 hours. Learning format: On-demand video.

5. Savannah College of Art and Design (SCAD) - Online BFA in Graphic Design: SCAD is a US-based private art school founded in 1978. Their Online BFA in Graphic Design offers comprehensive education in art and design principles with hands-on guidance. The objective is to prepare students for careers as graphic designers, art directors, and visual communications specialists. Price: $41,130 per year. Duration: 180 hours. Learning format: Online with real-time streaming.

6. Maryland Institute College of Art - Graphic Design History: An Introduction: Based in Baltimore, MICA was founded in 1826 and is considered one of the oldest art colleges in the country. The course explores the evolution of graphic design and the development of visual communication across cultures and historical periods. Price: $20 per month. Duration: 42 hours. Learning format: On-demand video.

7. Central Saint Martins - Graphic Design for Beginners Online Short Course: Central Saint Martins is a public art university in the UK under the University of the Arts London. The Graphic Design for Beginners Online Short Course helps students onboard foundational skills in graphic design, focusing on 20 key graphic design principles. Price: £420. Duration: 3 weeks. Learning format: Online with live lessons and video learning.

8. The Graphic Design School - Intensive Foundation Course: Founded in 2008, The Graphic Design School was the first ever solely online graphic design school in the world. The Intensive Foundation Course is made up of eleven different modules covering basics such as typography, logotype design, and design systems. Price: €3690 one-off or €320 monthly for 12 months. Duration: Approx. 12 weeks.

How to choose the graphic design school that is right for you: Define your goals for your learning journey, decide what sort of course you want to study and whether you need recognized certification, consider your budget, and evaluate job placement and career support opportunities.

Conclusion: Deciding on the right online graphic design school and course will depend heavily on factors such as learning objectives, career goals, current skill level, budget, time commitment, and preferred learning style.

Graphic design is a creative discipline that involves combining art, technology, and design to create visual content to convey specific messages to targeted groups.
